conversations.summary: Kyle Becker argues that crypto's hardest design problems are less about wallet usability and more about demand, market structure, founder-market fit, and complex multi-party systems where blockchain can function as distributed accounting infrastructure.
conversations.title: Crypto's Real Design Problem Is Not Usability
